TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-06-2002 IN 503, PROVE-UP HEARING AS TO DEFT WESTERN MACARTHUR BY PLFT ROBERT DORAN (ASBESTOS) LAW OFFICES OF BRAYTON-PURCELL, 415/898-1555 ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF(S) SUBMITTED ON THE AFFIDAVITS. NO APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF WESTERN MACARTHUR. REQUEST FOR JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF ROBERT F. DORAN AND AGAINST DEFENDANT WESTERN MACARTHUR CO. IN THE SUM OF $172,600.00 AND JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF ESTHER DORAN AND AGAINST DEFENDANT WESTERN MACARTHUR CO. IN THE SUM OF $150,000.00 PLUS COSTS AND INTEREST AS PROVIDED BY LAW, IN AN AMOUNT TO BE DETERMINED LATER BY THE COURT. THE COURT SUA SPONTE TOOK MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION ON JUNE 6, 2002. JUDGE CHIANTELLI; CLERK: V. MU; MATTER WAS NOT REPORTED (503)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WESTERN MACARTHUR COMPANY $322,600.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $322,600.00, SEE SCANNED DOC FOR BREAKDOWN AMOUNTS AS TO EACH PLAINTIFF.
